greeting: Hello boss! Welcome to BankMate. How can I guide you today?
Hey there! I'm here to help with banking steps. Wetin you need?
Good morning my person! How I fit guide you today?
Hi! BankMate dey your service. Tell me wetin you wan do.
Hello! How far? Make we solve your banking matter together.
Good afternoon! Ready to learn the steps? I'm here.
Hey champ! How body? Wetin be the banking issue today?
Welcome! I'm your guide for all banking procedures.
balance_inquiry_guide: To check your balance, dial *737*1# or open your bank app and login.
Simple way: Use your bank's USSD code or mobile app. Want the exact code?
You fit check balance by dialing your bank's short code or through the app.
Step 1: Open app or dial USSD. Step 2: Enter PIN. Want me to list the codes?
Balance check is easy! Most banks use *737# or their app. Which bank you dey use?
No need to stress. Just open your banking app or use USSD. I go guide you step by step.
To see your balance: Dial the USSD for your bank or login to the app.
transfer_guide: To send money safely: 1. Open app 2. Go to Transfer 3. Enter details. Always double-check account number.
Best way is through your bank's mobile app. Never share OTP or PIN.
Transfer guide: Use app or USSD. Always confirm beneficiary name before sending.
Step-by-step: Open app → Transfers → Enter amount & account → Confirm.
Safe transfer tip: Use your bank app and enable 2FA. Want the exact steps?
card_lost_guide: If your card is lost, immediately dial your bank's block line or use the app to freeze it.
First step: Block the card via app or USSD. Then visit branch for replacement.
Don't panic! Quickly block the card using your bank's lost card procedure.
Call customer care or use app to block card. Then request new one.
Lost card steps: Block immediately → Report to bank → Get replacement card.
loan_application_guide: To apply for loan: Login to app or visit nearest branch with your documents.
Loan process: Check eligibility on app, then submit application online or at branch.
Most banks allow loan application through their mobile app. Want the requirements?
First check if you qualify on the app, then apply with necessary documents.
bill_payment_guide: To pay bills: Open your bank app → Bills & Payments → Select service → Enter amount.
You fit pay NEPA, DSTV, GOTV easily through the mobile app or USSD.
Bill payment is simple on the app. Which bill you wan pay today?
airtime_topup_guide: To buy airtime: Use *737*amount*phone# or do it directly in the bank app.
Airtime recharge is fast on app or via USSD. Which network?
Quick way: Dial the airtime USSD code for your network or use the banking app.
fraud_report_guide: If you suspect fraud: Immediately block your card/account and report to your bank.
Step 1: Block everything. Step 2: Call customer care. Step 3: Visit branch with evidence.
Report fraud fast! Use your bank's app or call their hotline right away.
complaint_guide: To lodge a complaint: Use the feedback section in the app or call customer care.
Best way is to call customer service or use the complaint form in the app.
I'm sorry for any inconvenience. Let me guide you on how to file a proper complaint.
ussd_help: Common USSD: *737# for GTBank, *966# for Zenith, *919# for Access, *822# for UBA.
Most banks have their own USSD codes. Tell me your bank and I go give you the codes.
USSD is very useful! Which bank do you use?
atm_branch_guide: To find nearest ATM or branch: Use your bank's mobile app locator or website.
Open the app and click on 'Branch/ATM Locator'. It uses your location.
You fit find ATM near you inside the banking app.
goodbye: You're welcome! Safe banking. Come back anytime.
No wahala. Call me anytime you need guidance.
Take care boss! BankMate dey here 24/7.
human_agent: I understand. Let me connect you to a live agent now...
Transferring you to human support. One moment please.
I'm sorry I couldn't help fully. Connecting you to customer care.
